question: In the first five laps of the race, how many overtakes occurred in each category—retirements, pit stops, start-related overtakes, and standard on-track passes?
evidence: Overtake classifications: R (Retirement) - overtaken driver retired on same lap as overtake; P (Pit) - overtake during pit entry (driver pitted same lap) or pit exit (driver pitted previous lap, time gap < typical pit stop duration); S (Start) - overtake on first lap, drivers within two grid positions at start; T (Track) - default classification when none of above conditions apply. User question specifies timeframe: first five laps of race.
